channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — June 23, 2026
item.description: THIS recognition is a far better protective device than ANY form of level confusion because it introduces correction at the level of the error. It is essential to remember that ONLY the mind can create. Implicit in this is the corollary that correction belongs at the THOUGHT level. To repeat an earlier statement and to extend it somewhat, the Soul is already perfect, and therefore does not require

item.title: Lesson 58: These ideas are for review today:
item.description: These ideas are for review today: [36] “My holiness envelops everything I see.” From my holiness does the perception of the real world come. Having forgiven, I no longer see myself as guilty. I can accept the innocence that is the truth about me. Seen through understanding eyes the holiness of the world is all I see, for I can picture only the thoughts I hold about myself. [37] “My holiness blesse
